recommendation: Keep a human one click away
evidence: Automation / 'no human' is the strongest marker of negative reviews (8x on Trustpilot) and the top negative topic on Reddit.

recommendation: Disclose the AI and admit its limits
evidence: Accuracy and 'doesn't work' complaints separate the classes most cleanly (negative class 1.8x on Reddit, 6.9x on Trustpilot).
Support and resolution language drives the negative class in both sources (1.2x Reddit, 1.8x Trustpilot).

recommendation: Match the persona to the role
evidence: Anthropomorphism is welcomed when AI IS the product but reads as cold in transactions; Reddit is most positive for AI-native, least for rentals.

recommendation: Show all-in price and refund rules up front
evidence: Pricing and fees dominate negative rental reviews (5.4x on Trustpilot); a rental-specific, not AI-specific, frustration.
